papers.title: Achieving Low-Latency Graph-Based Vector Search via Aligning Best-First Search Algorithm with SSD.
papers.abstract: We propose PipeANN , an on-disk graph-based approximate nearest neighbor search (ANNS) system, which significantly bridges the latency gap with in-memory ones. We achieve this by aligning the best-first search algorithm with SSD characteristics, avoiding strict compute-I/O order across search steps. Experiments show that PipeANN has 1.14 × –2.02 × search latency compared to in-memory Vamana, and 35.0% of the latency of on-disk DiskANN in billion-scale datasets, without sacrificing search accuracy. PipeANN is open-source at https://github.com/thustorage/PipeANN.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PipeANN ，这是一种基于磁盘图的近似最近邻搜索（ANNS）系统，它显着地弥补了与内存中的延迟差距。我们通过将最佳优先搜索算法与 SSD 特性结合起来，避免跨搜索步骤的严格计算 I/O 顺序来实现这一目标。实验表明，与内存中的 Vamana 相比，PipeANN 的搜索延迟为 1.14 × –2.02 ×，在十亿级数据集上的延迟为磁盘 DiskANN 的 35.0%，且不牺牲搜索精度。 PipeANN 是开源的，位于 https://github.com/thustorage/PipeANN。

papers.title: Basilisk: Using Provenance Invariants to Automate Proofs of Undecidable Protocols.
papers.abstract:
Distributed protocols are challenging to design correctly. One promising approach to improve their reliability uses formal verification to prove that a protocol satisfies a desired safety property. These proofs require finding an inductive invariant that holds initially, implies safety, and is inductive. Devising an inductive invariant is a difficult task that prior work has either automated by requiring the protocol to be expressed in a decidable but restrictive fragment of logic, or required the developer to find by a painful search process.

In this work we aim to automatically find inductive invariants without restricting the logic. We do so using two key insights. Our first insight is that many of the complex inter-host properties that prior work required the developer to provide can instead be derived using Provenance Invariants , a class of invariants that relate a local variable in a host to its provenance, i.e., the protocol step that caused it to have its current value. By tracing the provenance of one host variable back to another host, we can derive an invariant relating the two hosts' states. Second, we develop an algorithm called Atomic Sharding to derive Provenance Invariants automatically by statically analyzing the protocol's steps.

We implement these ideas in a tool called Basilisk and apply it to 16 distributed protocols. Basilisk automatically finds a set of invariants and proves their inductiveness, with little or no developer assistance. In all cases, these generated invariants are sufficient for us to prove safety without needing to identify any new inductive invariants.
papers.abstract_zh:
正确设计分布式协议具有挑战性。提高其可靠性的一种有前途的方法是使用形式验证来证明协议满足所需的安全属性。这些证明需要找到一个归纳不变量，该不变量最初成立，意味着安全，并且是归纳的。设计归纳不变量是一项艰巨的任务，之前的工作要么通过要求协议以可判定但限制性的逻辑片段来表达来实现自动化，要么需要开发人员通过痛苦的搜索过程来找到。

在这项工作中，我们的目标是在不限制逻辑的情况下自动找到归纳不变量。我们使用两个关键见解来做到这一点。我们的第一个见解是，以前的工作需要开发人员提供的许多复杂的主机间属性可以使用来源不变量派生，这是一类将主机中的局部变量与其来源相关联的不变量，即导致其具有当前值的协议步骤。通过将一个主机变量的来源追溯到另一​​台主机，我们可以导出与两个主机状态相关的不变量。其次，我们开发了一种称为“原子分片”的算法，通过静态分析协议的步骤来自动导出来源不变量。

我们在名为 Basilisk 的工具中实现了这些想法，并将其应用于 16 个分布式协议。 Basilisk 会自动找到一组不变量并证明它们的归纳性，几乎不需要开发人员的帮助。在所有情况下，这些生成的不变量足以让我们证明安全性，而不需要识别任何新的归纳不变量。

papers.title: Bayesian Code Diffusion for Efficient Automatic Deep Learning Program Optimization.
papers.abstract: We introduce Bayesian code diffusion, a new deep learning program optimization strategy devised to accelerate the auto-tuning process of deep learning compilers. By using the concepts of prior and posterior distributions in the Bayesian framework and reformulating them to the context of deep learning program optimization, the proposed approach efficiently searches for optimal program code in a significantly reduced search space through an iterative diffusion of program code. To further enhance the efficiency of program optimization, we propose pre-training and fine-tuning of the cost model, which improves both the model's predictive accuracy and training efficiency. We implement Bayesian code diffusion in Ansor and evaluate its performance on a wide range of deep learning models on both CPUs and GPUs. Existing approaches struggle to reliably generate high-performing deep learning programs, i.e., achieving low program execution latency, across various configurations, including diverse deep learning model architectures and hardware platforms (CPU and GPU). In contrast, Bayesian code diffusion reduces the end-to-end compilation (optimization) time required to generate the equivalent program execution latency on various setups, e.g., achieving up to 3.31× optimization speedup. This substantial improvement demonstrates that Bayesian code diffusion performs efficient and principled deep learning program optimization across a wide range of deep learning models, operators, and hardware (CPU and GPU).
papers.abstract_zh: 我们引入贝叶斯代码扩散，这是一种新的深度学习程序优化策略，旨在加速深度学习编译器的自动调整过程。通过使用贝叶斯框架中的先验分布和后验分布的概念，并将它们重新表述到深度学习程序优化的背景下，所提出的方法通过程序代码的迭代扩散，在显着减小的搜索空间中有效地搜索最优程序代码。为了进一步提高程序优化的效率，我们提出对成本模型进行预训练和微调，从而提高了模型的预测精度和训练效率。我们在 Ansor 中实现贝叶斯代码扩散，并在 CPU 和 GPU 上的各种深度学习模型上评估其性能。现有方法很难可靠地生成高性能深度学习程序，即在各种配置（包括不同的深度学习模型架构和硬件平台（CPU 和 GPU））中实现低程序执行延迟。相比之下，贝叶斯代码扩散减少了在各种设置上生成等效程序执行延迟所需的端到端编译（优化）时间，例如，实现高达 3.31 倍的优化加速。这一重大改进表明，贝叶斯代码扩散可以在各种深度学习模型、运算符和硬件（CPU 和 GPU）上执行高效且有原则的深度学习程序优化。

papers.title: BlitzScale: Fast and Live Large Model Autoscaling with O(1) Host Caching.
papers.abstract: Model autoscaling is the key mechanism to achieve serverless model-as-a-service, but it faces a fundamental trade-off between scaling speed and storage/memory usage to cache parameters, and cannot meet frequent scaling requirements across multiple hosts. The key problem is that data plane performance is slow, and scaled instances remain stopped while parameters are loading. In this paper, we first show that the data plane can be made fast with no or O(1) caching by loading parameters through the compute network between GPUs because: (1) its speed is comparable to host cache and is underutilized, and (2) scaling multiple instances requires no or O(1) caching with network-optimized multicast. Second, autoscaling can be made live by breaking the scaling abstraction for inference from a coarse-grained instance-level to a fine-grained layer-level. This allows us to offload the layer computation from the overloaded serving instances to the scaled ones without waiting for the parameters to be fully loaded. Under real-world workloads, our system BLITZSCALE achieves up to 94 % lower tail latency reductions compared to state-of-the-art autoscaling system (ServerlessLLM), and it reduces the GPU time used for serving by 49 % when compared with serving systems that do not support autoscaling like DistServe and vLLM with the same service-level-agreement.
papers.abstract_zh: 模型自动伸缩是实现无服务器模型即服务的关键机制，但它面临着伸缩速度和缓存参数的存储/内存使用之间的基本权衡，并且无法满足跨多个主机的频繁伸缩需求。关键问题是数据平面性能缓慢，并且在加载参数时缩放实例保持停止状态。在本文中，我们首先证明，通过通过 GPU 之间的计算网络加载参数，可以在没有缓存或 O(1) 缓存的情况下加快数据平面的速度，因为：(1) 其速度与主机缓存相当，并且未得到充分利用，(2) 扩展多个实例不需要使用网络优化的多播或 O(1) 缓存。其次，可以通过打破从粗粒度实例级别到细粒度层级别的推理的缩放抽象来实现自动缩放。这允许我们将层计算从超载的服务实例卸载到缩放的服务实例，而无需等待参数完全加载。在实际工作负载下，与最先进的自动扩展系统 (ServerlessLLM) 相比，我们的系统 BLITZSCALE 的尾部延迟降低了 94%，并且与具有相同服务级别协议的 DistServe 和 vLLM 等不支持自动扩展的服务系统相比，用于服务的 GPU 时间减少了 49%。

papers.title: Building Bridges: Safe Interactions with Foreign Languages through Omniglot.
papers.abstract:
Memory- and type-safe languages promise to eliminate entire classes of systems vulnerabilities by construction. In practice, though, even clean-slate systems often need to incorporate libraries written in other languages with fewer safety guarantees. Because these interactions threaten the soundness of safe languages, they can reintroduce the exact vulnerabilities that safe languages prevent in the first place.

This paper presents Omniglot: the first framework to efficiently uphold safety and soundness of Rust in the presence of unmodified and untrusted foreign libraries. Omniglot facilitates interactions with foreign code by integrating with a memory isolation primitive and validation infrastructure, and avoids expensive operations such as copying or serialization.

We implement Omniglot for two systems: we use it to integrate kernel components in a highly-constrained embedded operating system kernel, as well as to interface with conventional Linux userspace libraries. Omniglot performs comparably to approaches that deliver weaker guarantees and significantly better than those with similar safety guarantees.
papers.abstract_zh:
内存和类型安全语言有望通过构造消除整类系统漏洞。但在实践中，即使是全新的系统也常常需要合并用其他语言编写的库，而安全保证较少。由于这些交互威胁到安全语言的健全性，因此它们可能会重新引入安全语言首先要防止的漏洞。

本文介绍了 Omniglot：第一个在存在未经修改和不受信任的外部库的情况下有效维护 Rust 安全性和健全性的框架。 Omniglot 通过与内存隔离原语和验证基础设施集成来促进与外部代码的交互，并避免复制或序列化等昂贵的操作。

我们为两个系统实现 Omniglot：我们使用它来将内核组件集成到高度受限的嵌入式操作系统内核中，以及与传统的 Linux 用户空间库进行交互。 Omniglot 的性能与提供较弱保证的方法相当，但明显优于具有类似安全保证的方法。

papers.title: Compass: Encrypted Semantic Search with High Accuracy.
papers.abstract: We present Compass, a semantic search system for encrypted data that achieves high accuracy, matching state-of-the-art plaintext search quality, while ensuring the privacy of data, queries, and results, even if the server is compromised. Compass contributes a novel way to traverse a state-of-the-art graph-based semantic search index and a white-box co-design with Oblivious RAM, a cryptographic primitive that hides access patterns, to enable efficient search over encrypted embeddings. With our techniques, Directional Neighbor Filtering, Speculative Neighbor Prefetch, and Graph-Traversal Tailored ORAM, Compass achieves user-perceived latencies within or around a second and is orders of magnitude faster than baselines under various network conditions.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Compass，这是一种用于加密数据的语义搜索系统，即使服务器受到威胁，也能实现高精度、与最先进的明文搜索质量相匹配，同时确保数据、查询和结果的隐私。 Compass 提供了一种新颖的方式来遍历最先进的基于图形的语义搜索索引，并与 Oblivious RAM（一种隐藏访问模式的加密原语）进行白盒协同设计，以实现对加密嵌入的高效搜索。借助我们的定向邻居过滤、推测邻居预取和图遍历定制 ORAM 等技术，Compass 可以在一秒或一秒左右实现用户感知的延迟，并且在各种网络条件下比基线快几个数量级。

papers.title: DecDEC: A Systems Approach to Advancing Low-Bit LLM Quantization.
papers.abstract: Quantization of Large Language Models (LLMs) has recently gained popularity, particularly for on-device settings with limited hardware resources. While efficient, quantization inevitably degrades model quality, especially in aggressive low-bit settings such as 3-bit and 4-bit precision. In this paper, we propose DecDEC, an inference scheme that improves the quality of low-bit LLMs while preserving the key benefits of quantization: GPU memory savings and latency reduction. DecDEC stores the residual matrix -- the difference between full-precision and quantized weights -- in CPU, and dynamically fetches the residuals for only a small portion of the weights. This portion corresponds to the salient channels, marked by activation outliers, with the fetched residuals helping to correct quantization errors in these channels. Salient channels are identified dynamically at each decoding step by analyzing the input activations -- this enables adaptation to the dynamic nature of activation distribution, thus maximizing the effectiveness of error compensation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of DecDEC by augmenting state-of-the-art quantization methods. For example, DecDEC reduces the perplexity of a 3-bit Llama-3-8B-Instruct model from 10.15 to 9.12 -- outperforming its 3.5-bit counterpart -- while adding less than 0.0003\% to GPU memory usage and incurring only a 1.7\% inference slowdown on NVIDIA RTX 4050 Mobile.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的量化最近越来越受欢迎，特别是对于硬件资源有限的设备上设置。量化虽然高效，但不可避免地会降低模型质量，尤其是在 3 位和 4 位精度等激进的低位设置中。在本文中，我们提出了 DecDEC，这是一种推理方案，可以提高低位 LLM 的质量，同时保留量化的关键优势：节省 GPU 内存和减少延迟。 DecDEC 将残差矩阵（全精度权重与量化权重之间的差异）存储在 CPU 中，并动态获取一小部分权重的残差。该部分对应于显着通道，由激活异常值标记，获取的残差有助于纠正这些通道中的量化误差。通过分析输入激活，在每个解码步骤动态识别显着通道——这使得能够适应激活分布的动态特性，从而最大化误差补偿的有效性。我们通过增强最先进的量化方法来证明 DecDEC 的有效性。例如，DecDEC 将 3 位 Llama-3-8B-Instruct 模型的困惑度从 10.15 降低到 9.12，优于 3.5 位模型，同时 GPU 内存使用量增加不到 0.0003%，并且在 NVIDIA RTX 4050 Mobile 上仅导致 1.7% 的推理速度下降。

papers.title: Decentralized, Epoch-based F2FS Journaling with Fine-grained Crash Recovery.
papers.abstract:
F2FS, a log-structured filesystem, has gained widespread adoption in Android systems. However, F2FS relies on coarse-grained checkpointing for crash recovery. When triggered, this mechanism significantly degrades system performance by blocking file writes. Additionally, F2FS’s checkpointing approach may not fully recover file data and metadata to a consistent state after a crash. Given these limitations, it is crucial to design a new journaling mechanism for F2FS that provides fine-grained crash recovery. While journaling methods are well-studied for in-place-update filesystems (such as JBD2 for EXT4), directly applying these state-of-the-art techniques to F2FS - an out-of-place-update filesystem - does not yield similar benefits.

In this paper, we propose a novel journaling technique, called F2FSJ, for F2FS with ordered journal mode. Catering to the out-of-place update features of F2FS, F2FSJ incorporate several innovative designs. First, in F2FSJ, only metadata changes are journaled and committed after data flushing, by which I/O and storage overheads can be mitigated. Second, we propose a decentralized journal design by embedding journal logs into inodes, which significantly reduces lock contention and interference when recording metadata changes. Third, we propose an epoch-based approach with a novel data/control-plane decoupling mechanism, which eliminates waiting times during journal period transfers. Finally, for journal apply, we propose a fast-forward-to-latest approach to consolidate multiple small updates into one update for reducing small writes. We have implemented a fully functional prototype of F2FSJ and conducted extensive experiments. Our experimental results demonstrate that F2FSJ can effectively reduce the checkpointing time by up to 4.9x and reduce the latency by up to 35% compared with F2FS. F2FSJ is open-sourced for public access.
papers.abstract_zh:
F2FS 是一种日志结构文件系统，已在 Android 系统中得到广泛采用。然而，F2FS 依赖于粗粒度检查点来进行崩溃恢复。触发后，此机制会阻止文件写入，从而显着降低系统性能。此外，F2FS 的检查点方法可能无法在崩溃后将文件数据和元数据完全恢复到一致状态。鉴于这些限制，为 F2FS 设计一种新的日志机制来提供细粒度的崩溃恢复至关重要。虽然日志方法针对就地更新文件系统（例如用于 EXT4 的 JBD2）进行了深入研究，但将这些最先进的技术直接应用于 F2FS（一种异地更新文件系统）并不会产生类似的好处。

在本文中，我们针对具有有序日志模式的 F2FS 提出了一种新颖的日志技术，称为 F2FSJ。针对F2FS独特的更新特点，F2FSJ融入了多项创新设计。首先，在 F2FSJ 中，仅在数据刷新后记录和提交元数据更改，从而可以减轻 I/O 和存储开销。其次，我们提出了一种去中心化的日志设计，将日志日志嵌入到索引节点中，这可以显着减少记录元数据更改时的锁争用和干扰。第三，我们提出了一种基于纪元的方法，具有新颖的数据/控制平面解耦机制，消除了日志周期传输期间的等待时间。最后，对于日志应用，我们提出了一种快进到最新的方法，将多个小更新合并为一个更新，以减少小写入。我们已经实现了 F2FSJ 的功能齐全的原型并进行了广泛的实验。我们的实验结果表明，与 F2FS 相比，F2FSJ 可以有效地将检查点时间缩短高达 4.9 倍，并将延迟降低高达 35%。 F2FSJ 是开源的，可供公众访问。

papers.title: Decouple and Decompose: Scaling Resource Allocation with DeDe.
papers.abstract: Efficient resource allocation is essential in cloud systems to facilitate resource sharing among tenants. However, the growing scale of these optimization problems have outpaced commercial solvers commonly employed in production. To accelerate resource allocation, prior approaches either customize solutions for narrow domains or impose workload-specific assumptions. In this work, we revisit real-world resource allocation problems and uncover a common underlying structure: the vast majority of these problems are inherently separable, i.e., they optimize the aggregate utility of individual resource and demand allocations, under separate constraints for each resource and each demand. Building on this observation, we develop DeDe, a scalable and theoretically rooted optimization framework for large-scale resource allocation. At the core of DeDe is a decouple-and-decompose approach: it decouples entangled resource and demand constraints and thereby decomposes the overall optimization into alternating per-resource and per-demand subproblems that can be solved efficiently and in parallel. We have implemented and released DeDe as a Python package with a familiar modeling interface. Our experiments on three representative resource allocation tasks -- cluster scheduling, traffic engineering, and load balancing -- demonstrate that DeDe delivers significant speedups while generating higher-quality allocations.
papers.abstract_zh: 在云系统中，高效的资源分配对于促进租户之间的资源共享至关重要。然而，这些优化问题的规模不断扩大，已经超过了生产中常用的商业求解器。为了加速资源分配，先前的方法要么为狭窄的领域定制解决方案，要么强加特定于工作负载的假设。在这项工作中，我们重新审视现实世界的资源分配问题，并揭示了一个共同的底层结构：这些问题中的绝大多数本质上是可分离的，即它们在每种资源和每种需求的单独约束下优化单个资源和需求分配的总效用。基于这一观察，我们开发了 DeDe，一个可扩展且有理论基础的优化框架，用于大规模资源分配。 DeDe 的核心是一种解耦和分解方法：它解耦了纠缠的资源和需求约束，从而将整体优化分解为交替的每个资源和每个需求的子问题，这些子问题可以有效地并行解决。我们已经实现并发布了 DeDe 作为 Python 包，具有​​熟悉的建模界面。我们对三个代表性资源分配任务（集群调度、流量工程和负载平衡）进行的实验表明，DeDe 在生成更高质量的分配的同时提供了显着的加速。

papers.title: Deriving Semantic Checkers from Tests to Detect Silent Failures in Production Distributed Systems.
papers.abstract:
Production distributed systems provide rich features, but various defects can cause a system to silently violate its semantics without explicit errors. Such failures cause serious consequences. Yet, they are extremely challenging to detect, as it requires deep domain knowledge and substantial manual efforts to write good checkers.

In this paper, we explore a novel approach that directly derives semantic checkers from system test code. We first present a large-scale study on existing system test cases. Guided by the study findings, we develop T2C, a framework that uses static and dynamic analysis to transform and generalize a test into a runtime checker. We apply T2C on four large, popular distributed systems and successfully derive tens to hundreds of checkers. These checkers detect 15 out of 20 real-world silent failures we reproduce and incur small runtime overhead.
papers.abstract_zh:
生产分布式系统提供了丰富的功能，但各种缺陷可能导致系统在没有显式错误的情况下默默地违反其语义。此类故障会造成严重后果。然而，检测它们极具挑战性，因为它需要深厚的领域知识和大量的手动工作才能编写好的检查器。

在本文中，我们探索了一种直接从系统测试代码派生语义检查器的新颖方法。我们首先对现有系统测试用例进行大规模研究。在研究结果的指导下，我们开发了 T2C，这是一个使用静态和动态分析将测试转换和概括为运行时检查器的框架。我们将 T2C 应用在四个大型、流行的分布式系统上，并成功派生出数十到数百个检查器。这些检查器检测到我们重现的 20 个现实世界静默故障中的 15 个，并产生少量的运行时开销。

papers.title: Deterministic Client: Enforcing Determinism on Untrusted Machine Code.
papers.abstract: This paper presents Deterministic Client (DeCl), a software-based sandboxing system for enforcing deterministic behavior on untrusted machine code, either x86-64 or Arm64. DeCl adapts techniques from Software Fault Isolation (SFI) traditionally used to guarantee memory isolation to instead enforce the stronger property of determinism. By using a simple and efficient machine code verifier that can guarantee that a program behaves deterministically, DeCl does not rely on a trusted compiler/interpreter for correctness. This allows the use of LLVM without compromising the size of the trusted code base. We also describe how to implement two efficient metering mechanisms that enforce deterministic preemption of sandboxed programs, and how DeCl can be implemented in combination with traditional software-based isolation, by making the sandboxed code position-oblivious. DeCl is able to combine and improve upon the benefits of both interpreters and JIT compilers at once, with low CPU overhead, fast startup time, and strong security via a small trusted code base. We evaluate DeCl's effectiveness on general-purpose CPU benchmarks, as well as in an application-specific context by integrating with the Groundhog smart contract engine, and using DeCl for zero-knowledge-proof verification.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了确定性客户端 (DeCl)，这是一种基于软件的沙箱系统，用于在不受信任的机器代码（x86-64 或 Arm64）上实施确定性行为。 DeCl 采用了传统上用于保证内存隔离的软件故障隔离 (SFI) 技术，以强制执行更强的确定性属性。通过使用可以保证程序确定性运行的简单高效的机器代码验证器，DeCl 不依赖于受信任的编译器/解释器来确保正确性。这允许在不影响可信代码库大小的情况下使用 LLVM。我们还描述了如何实现两种有效的计量机制来强制沙盒程序的确定性抢占，以及如何通过使沙盒代码位置无关来与传统的基于软件的隔离相结合来实现 DeCl。 DeCl 能够同时结合和改进解释器和 JIT 编译器的优点，具有低 CPU 开销、快速启动时间以及通过小型可信代码库实现的强大安全性。我们通过与 Groundhog 智能合约引擎集成并使用 DeCl 进行零知识证明验证，评估了 DeCl 在通用 CPU 基准测试以及特定应用程序环境中的有效性。

papers.title: Disentangling the Dual Role of NIC Receive Rings.
papers.abstract:
CPUs parallelize packet processing across cores via per-core receive (Rx) rings, which are typically sized to absorb bursts with >=1Ki entries by default. The combined I/O working set (packet buffers pointed to by all Rx rings) easily exceeds the LLC capacity, thus degrading performance due to high memory bandwidth pressure. Recent work has reduced the I/O working set size by sharing Rx rings among cores with the "shRing" system. But this approach suffers from a bottleneck under imbalanced loads, which are common.

We contend that the bottleneck stems from an unnecessary entanglement of two orthogonal producer-consumer structures: (1) memory allocation, where the core produces empty buffers that the NIC consumes to store packets; and (2) packet delivery, where the NIC produces incoming packets that the core consumes. We propose rxBisect, a new CPU-NIC interface that decouples these structures. RxBisect replaces each Rx ring with two separate rings corresponding to the two structures, allowing memory allocation to be performed independently of packet reception. RxBisect can thus pass empty buffers efficiently between cores upon imbalance, thereby eliminating the aforementioned bottleneck. We implement rxBisect with software emulation and find that it improves throughput by up to 20% and 37% relative to the state-of-the-art (shRing) and state-of-the-practice (per-core Rx rings).
papers.abstract_zh:
CPU 通过每核心接收 (Rx) 环跨核心并行处理数据包，默认情况下，接收环的大小通常可吸收 >=1Ki 条目的突发。组合的 I/O 工作集（所有 Rx 环指向的数据包缓冲区）很容易超出 LLC 容量，从而由于高内存带宽压力而降低性能。最近的工作通过使用“shRing”系统在内核之间共享 Rx 环来减少 I/O 工作集大小。但这种方法在负载不平衡的情况下会遇到瓶颈，这种情况很常见。

我们认为瓶颈源于两个正交的生产者-消费者结构的不必要的纠缠：（1）内存分配，核心产生空缓冲区，NIC 用来存储数据包； (2) 数据包传送，其中 NIC 生成核心使用的传入数据包。我们提出了 rxBisect，一种新的 CPU-NIC 接口，可以解耦这些结构。 RxBisect 将每个 Rx 环替换为与两个结构相对应的两个单独的环，从而允许独立于数据包接收执行内存分配。因此，RxBisect 可以在不平衡时在核心之间有效地传递空缓冲区，从而消除上述瓶颈。我们通过软件仿真实现 rxBisect，发现相对于最先进的 (shRing) 和最先进的实践（每核 Rx 环），它的吞吐量分别提高了 20% 和 37%。

papers.title: EMT: An OS Framework for New Memory Translation Architectures.
papers.abstract:
With terabyte-scale memory capacity and memory-intensive workloads, memory translation has become a major performance bottleneck. Many novel hardware schemes are developed to speed up memory translation, but few are experimented with commodity OSes. A main reason is that memory management in major OSes, like Linux, does not have the extensibility to empower emerging hardware schemes.

We develop EMT, a pragmatic framework atop Linux to empower different hardware schemes of memory translation such as radix tree and hash table. EMT provides an architecture neutral interface that 1) supports diverse memory translation architectures, 2) enables hardware-specific optimizations, 3) accommodates modern hardware and OS complexity, and 4) has negligible overhead over hardwired implementations. We port Linux’s memory management onto EMT and show that EMT enables extensibility without sacrificing performance. We use EMT to implement OS support for ECPT and FPT, two recent experimental translation schemes for fast translation; EMT enables us to understand the OS perspective of these architectures and further optimize their designs.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着 TB 级内存容量和内存密集型工作负载的出现，内存转换已成为主要的性能瓶颈。许多新颖的硬件方案被开发来加速内存转换，但很少在商用操作系统上进行实验。主要原因是 Linux 等主要操作系统中的内存管理不具备支持新兴硬件方案的可扩展性。

我们开发了 EMT，这是一个基于 Linux 的实用框架，用于支持不同的内存转换硬件方案，例如基数树和哈希表。 EMT 提供架构中立的接口，1) 支持不同的内存转换架构，2) 实现特定于硬件的优化，3) 适应现代硬件和操作系统的复杂性，4) 与硬连线实现相比，开销可以忽略不计。我们将 Linux 的内存管理移植到 EMT 上，并表明 EMT 在不牺牲性能的情况下实现了可扩展性。我们使用 EMT 来实现对 ECPT 和 FPT 的操作系统支持，这是最近两个用于快速翻译的实验性翻译方案； EMT 使我们能够了解这些架构的操作系统视角并进一步优化其设计。

papers.title: Enabling Efficient GPU Communication over Multiple NICs with FuseLink.
papers.abstract: Machine learning (ML) clusters stack multiple network interface cards (NICs) within each server to improve inter-server GPU communication bandwidth. However, existing systems fall short in fully utilizing NICs because of static GPU-NIC bindings. This leads to bottlenecks at hot-spot NICs when handling imbalanced communication in ML tasks. For example, large language model serving instances may have different communication demands across NICs; expert-parallel training tasks have imbalanced all-to-all traffic; and the embedding transmission volumes during recommendation model training vary across GPUs. To fully utilize all NICs, we propose FuseLink to enable efficient GPU communication over multiple NICs. FuseLink extends inter-server network by integrating high-speed intra-server connections, and leverages GPUs to efficiently relay traffic to idle NICs. We implement FuseLink and integrate it into NCCL, so that ML applications can benefit from FuseLink seamlessly without code modifications. Compared to NCCL, we demonstrate that FuseLink achieves up to 212GBps bandwidth between two inter-server GPUs and accelerates ML tasks with dynamic traffic patterns. Specifically, it reduces the latencies of first-token generation in LLM model servings by 1.04-2.73?, improves the training throughput of mixture-of-experts model by up to 1.3?, and accelerates deep learning recommendation model training by up to 1.2?.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 集群在每台服务器内堆叠多个网络接口卡 (NIC)，以提高服务器间 GPU 通信带宽。然而，由于静态 GPU-NIC 绑定，现有系统无法充分利用 NIC。在处理 ML 任务中的不平衡通信时，这会导致热点 NIC 出现瓶颈。例如，大型语言模型服务实例可能具有跨 NIC 的不同通信需求；专家并行的训练任务造成了所有流量的不平衡；推荐模型训练期间的嵌入传输量因 GPU 的不同而不同。为了充分利用所有 NIC，我们建议使用 FuseLink 来实现多个 NIC 上的高效 GPU 通信。 FuseLink 通过集成高速服务器内连接来扩展服务器间网络，并利用 GPU 有效地将流量中继到空闲 NIC。我们实现了 FuseLink 并将其集成到 NCCL 中，这样 ML 应用程序就可以无缝地从 FuseLink 中受益，而无需修改代码。与 NCCL 相比，我们证明 FuseLink 在两个服务器间 GPU 之间实现高达 212GBps 的带宽，并通过动态流量模式加速 ML 任务。具体来说，它将 LLM 模型服务中第一个令牌生成的延迟减少了 1.04-2.73?，将专家混合模型的训练吞吐量提高了 1.3?，并将深度学习推荐模型训练加速了 1.2?。

papers.title: Extending Applications Safely and Efficiently.
papers.abstract: This paper presents the Extension Interface Model (EIM) and bpftime, which together enable safer and more efficient extension of userspace applications than the current state-of-the-art. EIM is a new model that treats each required feature of an extension as a resource, including concrete hardware resources (e.g., memory) and abstract ones (e.g., the ability to invoke a function from the extended application). An extension manager, i.e., the person who manages a deployment, uses EIM to specify only the resources an extension needs to perform its task. bpftime is a new extension framework that enforces an EIM specification. Compared to prior systems, bpftime is efficient because it uses extended Berkeley Packet Filter (eBPF)-style verification, hardware-supported isolation features (e.g., Intel MPK), and dynamic binary rewriting. Moreover, bpftime is easy to adopt into existing workflows since it is compatible with the current eBPF ecosystem. We demonstrate the usefulness of EIM and bpftime across 6 use cases that improve security, monitor and enhance performance, and explore configuration trade-offs.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了扩展接口模型 (EIM) 和 bpftime，它们共同实现了比当前最先进技术更安全、更高效的用户空间应用程序扩展。 EIM 是一种新模型，它将扩展所需的每个功能视为资源，包括具体的硬件资源（例如内存）和抽象的硬件资源（例如从扩展应用程序调用功能的能力）。扩展管理员（即管理部署的人员）使用 EIM 来仅指定扩展执行其任务所需的资源。 bpftime 是一个强制执行 EIM 规范的新扩展框架。与之前的系统相比，bpftime 非常高效，因为它使用扩展的 Berkeley Packet Filter (eBPF) 式验证、硬件支持的隔离功能（例如 Intel MPK）和动态二进制重写。此外，bpftime 很容易采用现有工作流程，因为它与当前的 eBPF 生态系统兼容。我们通过 6 个用例展示了 EIM 和 bpftime 的实用性，这些用例可提高安全性、监控和增强性能以及探索配置权衡。

papers.title: Fast and Synchronous Crash Consistency with Metadata Write-Once File System.
papers.abstract: Low-latency persistent memory (PM) encourages file systems to pursue synchronous crash consistency. However, existing crash consistency approaches, such as journaling and log structure file system , incur many small, random, and ordered metadata I/Os, failing to exploit PM I/O potential. We propose a new file system model called metadata write-once file system (WOFS) to achieve fast and synchronous crash consistency. The key idea is to generate specific metadata for each file operation as a checksum-protected package and write it once with a single ordering point. The package is then managed to provide file abstractions through a package translation layer without extra writes. Using an array of techniques to generate, organize, and recover from packages, WOFS can provide practical, efficient, and reliable file system services. We implement WOLVES as a WOFS prototype in Linux kernel. Experiments using benchmarks and applications suggest that WOLVES can recover from crashes, improve operation throughput, and potentially reach PM I/O bandwidth limits.
papers.abstract_zh: 低延迟持久内存（PM）鼓励文件系统追求同步崩溃一致性。然而，现有的崩溃一致性方法，例如日志和日志结构文件系统，会产生许多小的、随机的、有序的元数据 I/O，无法发挥 PM I/O 的潜力。我们提出了一种称为元数据一次写入文件系统（WOFS）的新文件系统模型，以实现快速同步的崩溃一致性。关键思想是为每个文件操作生成特定的元数据作为受校验和保护的包，并使用单个订购点将其写入一次。然后管理包以通过包转换层提供文件抽象，而无需额外写入。 WOFS 使用一系列技术来生成、组织和从包中恢复，可以提供实用、高效、可靠的文件系统服务。我们在 Linux 内核中实现 WOLVES 作为 WOFS 原型。使用基准测试和应用程序进行的实验表明，WOLVES 可以从崩溃中恢复，提高操作吞吐量，并有可能达到 PM I/O 带宽限制。

papers.title: FineMem: Breaking the Allocation Overhead vs. Memory Waste Dilemma in Fine-Grained Disaggregated Memory Management.
papers.abstract:
RDMA-enabled memory disaggregation has emerged as an attractive approach to reducing memory costs in modern data centers. While RDMA enables efficient remote read/write operations, it presents challenges in remote memory (de)allocation. Consequently, existing systems adopt coarse-grained allocations (in GBs), leading to memory waste.

We introduce FineMem, an RDMA-connected remote memory management system that enables high-performance, fine-grained memory allocation. FineMem addresses latency and scalability challenges related to fine-grained allocations. It removes RDMA memory region (MR) registration costs from allocation paths through per-compute node MR pre-registration, while ensuring remote memory isolation using RDMA memory windows and a trusted allocation service on each compute node. It employs a lock-free, one-sided RDMA-based protocol to allocate memory chunks (e.g., 4KB, 2MB) without involving the memory node's CPU and maintains metadata consistency during compute node failures via logging. We show that FineMem reduces remote memory allocation latency by as much as 95% compared to state-of-the-art remote memory management systems. It enables memory malloc systems, key-value stores systems, and swap systems running on FineMem to achieve low memory waste with minimal overhead.
papers.abstract_zh:
支持 RDMA 的内存分解已成为降低现代数据中心内存成本的一种有吸引力的方法。虽然 RDMA 可实现高效的远程读/写操作，但它在远程内存分配（取消）方面提出了挑战。因此，现有系统采用粗粒度分配（以 GB 为单位），导致内存浪费。

我们推出 FineMem，这是一种 RDMA 连接的远程内存管理系统，可实现高性能、细粒度的内存分配。 FineMem 解决了与细粒度分配相关的延迟和可扩展性挑战。它通过每个计算节点 MR 预注册从分配路径中消除 RDMA 内存区域 (MR) 注册成本，同时使用 RDMA 内存窗口和每个计算节点上的可信分配服务确保远程内存隔离。它采用一种无锁、基于单侧 RDMA 的协议来分配内存块（例如 4KB、2MB），而不涉及内存节点的 CPU，并通过日志记录在计算节点故障期间保持元数据的一致性。我们发现，与最先进的远程内存管理系统相比，FineMem 可将远程内存分配延迟减少多达 95%。它使在 FineMem 上运行的内存 malloc 系统、键值存储系统和交换系统能够以最小的开销实现低内存浪费。

papers.title: Fork in the Road: Reflections and Optimizations for Cold Start Latency in Production Serverless Systems.
papers.abstract:
Serverless computing has seen widespread adoption in public cloud environments. However, it continues to suffer from long cold start latency , which remains a key performance bottleneck. We have conducted an in-depth investigation of existing cold start optimizations and evaluated their effectiveness in large-scale industrial deployments. Our study reveals several common limitations in prior research: (1) reliance on simplified assumptions that overlook the complexities of large-scale systems; (2) a narrow focus on optimizing isolated components of the cold start process, while ignoring end-to-end workflow interactions; and (3) insufficient attention to the challenges introduced by concurrent execution environments. As a result, despite incorporating prior techniques, cold start latency on the Ant Group serverless platform remains in the range of hundreds of milliseconds to several seconds.

This paper identifies three previously overlooked sources of latency: (1) control path latency , stemming from interactions within the serverless runtime; (2) resource contention latency , arising under high concurrency and sustained execution; and (3) user code initialization latency , which reflects the trade-off between resource efficiency and startup performance. To address these challenges, we propose a suite of novel techniques that overcome key limitations in existing approaches. These techniques are designed to be both adaptable to real-world workloads and scalable to large deployments. Our system, AFaaS (short for Ant FaaS), reduces cold start latency to the millisecond level. AFaaS has been deployed in production for over 18 months and has consistently demonstrated stable performance at scale.
papers.abstract_zh:
无服务器计算已在公共云环境中得到广泛采用。然而，它仍然面临着较长的冷启动延迟，这仍然是一个关键的性能瓶颈。我们对现有的冷启动优化进行了深入研究，并评估了它们在大规模工业部署中的有效性。我们的研究揭示了先前研究中的几个常见局限性：（1）依赖于简化的假设，忽视了大规模系统的复杂性； (2) 狭隘地关注优化冷启动过程的孤立组件，而忽略端到端工作流交互； (3)对并发执行环境带来的挑战关注不够。因此，尽管采用了现有技术，蚂蚁集团无服务器平台上的冷启动延迟仍然在数百毫秒到几秒的范围内。

本文确定了三个以前被忽视的延迟来源：（1）控制路径延迟，源于无服务器运行时内的交互； (2)高并发、持续执行下产生的资源争用延迟； (3)用户代码初始化延迟，反映了资源效率和启动性能之间的权衡。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一套克服现有方法的关键限制的新技术。这些技术旨在适应现实世界的工作负载并可扩展至大型部署。我们的系统 AFaaS（Ant FaaS 的缩写）将冷启动延迟降低到毫秒级别。 AFaaS 已在生产中部署超过 18 个月，并始终表现出稳定的大规模性能。

papers.title: Kamino: Efficient VM Allocation at Scale with Latency-Driven Cache-Aware Scheduling.
papers.abstract: In virtual machine (VM) allocation systems, caching repetitive and similar VM allocation requests and associated resolution rules is crucial for reducing computational costs and meeting strict latency requirements. While modern allocation systems distribute requests among multiple allocator agents and use caching to improve performance, current schedulers often neglect the cache state and latency considerations when assigning each new request to an agent. Due to the high variance in costs of cache hits and misses and the associated processing overheads of updating the caches, simple load-balancing and cache-aware mechanisms result in high latencies. We introduce Kamino , a high-performance, latency-driven and cache-aware request scheduling system aimed at minimizing end-to-end latencies. Kamino employs a novel scheduling algorithm grounded in theory which uses partial indicators from the cache state to assign each new request to the agent with the lowest estimated latency. Evaluation of Kamino using a high-fidelity simulator on large-scale production workloads shows a 42% reduction in average request latencies. Our deployment of Kamino in the control plane of a large public cloud confirms these improvements, with a 33% decrease in cache miss rates and 17% reduction in memory usage.
papers.abstract_zh: 在虚拟机 (VM) 分配系统中，缓存重复和类似的 VM 分配请求以及相关的解析规则对于降低计算成本和满足严格的延迟要求至关重要。虽然现代分配系统在多个分配器代理之间分配请求并使用缓存来提高性能，但当前的调度程序在将每个新请求分配给代理时通常会忽略缓存状态和延迟考虑因素。由于缓存命中和未命中成本以及更新缓存的相关处理开销存在很大差异，简单的负载平衡和缓存感知机制会导致高延迟。我们引入了 Kamino，这是一种高性能、延迟驱动和缓存感知的请求调度系统，旨在最大限度地减少端到端延迟。 Kamino 采用了一种基于理论的新颖调度算法，该算法使用缓存状态中的部分指示器将每个新请求分配给具有最低估计延迟的代理。使用高保真模拟器对大规模生产工作负载进行的 Kamino 评估显示，平均请求延迟减少了 42%。我们在大型公共云的控制平面中部署 Kamino 证实了这些改进，缓存未命中率降低了 33%，内存使用率降低了 17%。

papers.title: KPerfIR: Towards a Open and Compiler-centric Ecosystem for GPU Kernel Performance Tooling on Modern AI Workloads.
papers.abstract: In this work, we propose KPerfIR, a novel multilevel compiler-centric infrastructure to enable the development of customizable, extendable, and portable profiling tools tailored for modern artificial intelligence (AI) workloads on modern GPUs. Our approach integrates profiling capabilities directly into the compiler workflow, allowing profiling functionalities to be implemented as compiler passes, offering a programmable and reusable framework for performance analysis. This design bridges the gap between compilers and profilers, enabling fine-grained insights into complex optimization challenges such as overlapping the execution of fine-grained function units on GPUs. KPerfIR is integrated into the Triton infrastructure to highlight the power of a compiler-centric approach to advance performance analysis and optimization in the ever-evolving landscape of AI compilers. Our evaluation shows that our tool incurs low overhead (8.2%), provides accurate measurements (2% relative error), and delivers actionable insights into complicated GPU intra-kernel optimizations.
papers.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 KPerfIR，这是一种新颖的以编译器为中心的多级基础架构，能够开发针对现代 GPU 上的现代人工智能 (AI) 工作负载量身定制的可定制、可扩展和便携式分析工具。我们的方法将分析功能直接集成到编译器工作流程中，允许在编译器传递时实现分析功能，从而为性能分析提供可编程且可重用的框架。这种设计弥合了编译器和分析器之间的差距，能够对复杂的优化挑战进行细粒度的洞察，例如在 GPU 上重叠细粒度功能单元的执行。 KPerfIR 集成到 Triton 基础设施中，以突出以编译器为中心的方法的强大功能，以在不断发展的 AI 编译器领域推进性能分析和优化。我们的评估表明，我们的工具开销较低 (8.2%)，提供准确的测量（2% 相对误差），并为复杂的 GPU 内核内优化提供可操作的见解。

papers.title: KRR: Efficient and Scalable Kernel Record Replay.
papers.abstract:
Modern kernels are large, complex, and plagued with bugs. Unfortunately, their large size and complexity make kernel failures very challenging for developers to diagnose since failures encountered in deployment are often notoriously difficult to reproduce. Although record-replay techniques provide the powerful ability to accurately record a failed execution and deterministically replay it, enabling advanced manual and automated analysis techniques, they are inefficient and do not scale with modern I/O-intensive, concurrent workloads.

This paper introduces KRR, a kernel record-replay framework that provides a highly efficient execution recording mechanism by narrowing the scope of the record and replay boundary to the kernel. Unlike previous record-replay whole-stack approaches, KRR adopts a split-recorder design that employs the guest and the host to jointly record the kernel execution. Our evaluation demonstrates that KRR scales efficiently up to 8 cores, across a range of different workloads, including kernel compilation, RocksDB, and Nginx. When recording 8-core VMs that run RocksDB and kernel compilation, KRR incurs only a 1.52× ~ 2.79× slowdown compared to native execution, while traditional whole-VM RR suffers from 8.97× ~ 29.94× slowdown. We validate that KRR is practical and has a broad recording scope by reproducing 17 bugs across different Linux versions, including 6 non-deterministic bugs and 5 high-risk CVEs; KRR was able to record and reproduce all but one non-deterministic bug.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代内核庞大、复杂并且充满错误。不幸的是，它们的大尺寸和复杂性使得开发人员诊断内核故障非常困难，因为部署中遇到的故障通常很难重现。尽管记录重放技术提供了准确记录失败的执行并确定性地重放它的强大能力，从而支持高级手动和自动分析技术，但它们效率低下，并且无法随着现代 I/O 密集型并发工作负载进行扩展。

本文介绍了KRR，一个内核记录重放框架，它通过将记录和重放边界范围缩小到内核来提供高效的执行记录机制。与之前的记录-重放全栈方法不同，KRR 采用分割记录器设计，利用 guest 和 host 共同记录内核执行。我们的评估表明，KRR 可有效扩展到 8 个内核，适用于一系列不同的工作负载，包括内核编译、RocksDB 和 Nginx。当记录运行 RocksDB 和内核编译的 8 核虚拟机时，与本机执行相比，KRR 仅导致 1.52× ~ 2.79× 的减速，而传统的整体 VM RR 则遭受 8.97× ~ 29.94× 的减速。我们通过在不同 Linux 版本上重现 17 个 bug（包括 6 个非确定性 bug 和 5 个高风险 CVE）来验证 KRR 的实用性和记录范围广泛； KRR 能够记录和重现除一个非确定性错误之外的所有错误。

papers.title: Low End-to-End Latency atop a Speculative Shared Log with Fix-Ante Ordering.
papers.abstract: Today’s shared logs incur expensive coordination to globally order records across storage shards before they can deliver records to applications. This makes them unsuitable for many modern applications that must process ingested data as early as possible and realize low end-to-end (e2e) latencies. We propose SpecLog , a new shared log abstraction that delivers records by speculating the global order, allowing the application’s computation and shared-log coordination to be overlapped, thus reducing e2e latency. To enable accurate speculations, we introduce fix-ante ordering , a novel ordering mechanism that predetermines the global order and makes the shards adhere to the predetermined order. With fix-ante ordering, shards, except in rare cases, can accurately predict where their records will sit in the total order before global coordination. We build Belfast, an implementation of the SpecLog abstraction and fix-ante ordering. Our experiments show that Belfast offers lower e2e latencies than current shared logs while preserving their elasticity, flexibility, and scalability.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今的共享日志需要进行昂贵的协调才能跨存储分片对记录进行全局排序，然后才能将记录传递给应用程序。这使得它们不适合许多必须尽早处理获取的数据并实现低端到端 (e2e) 延迟的现代应用程序。我们提出了 SpecLog，一种新的共享日志抽象，它通过推测全局顺序来传递记录，允许应用程序的计算和共享日志协调重叠，从而减少 e2e 延迟。为了实现准确的推测，我们引入了固定前排序（fix-ante ordering），这是一种新颖的排序机制，可以预先确定全局顺序并使分片遵守预先确定的顺序。通过固定赌注排序，除极少数情况外，分片可以在全局协调之前准确预测其记录在总顺序中的位置。我们构建了 Belfast，它是 SpecLog 抽象和固定前排序的实现。我们的实验表明，贝尔法斯特提供比当前共享日志更低的 e2e 延迟，同时保留其弹性、灵活性和可扩展性。

papers.title: Mako: Speculative Distributed Transactions with Geo-Replication.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Mako, a highly available, high-throughput, and horizontally scalable transactional key-value store. Mako performs strongly consistent geo-replication to maintain availability despite entire datacenter failures, uses multi-core machines for fast serializable transaction processing, and shards data to scale out. To achieve these properties, especially to overcome the overheads of distributed transactions in geo-replicated settings, Mako decouples transaction execution and replication. This enables Mako to run transactions speculatively and very fast, and replicate transactions in the background to make them fault-tolerant. The key innovation in Mako is the use of two-phase commit (2PC) speculatively to allow distributed transactions to proceed without having to wait for their decisions to be replicated, while also preventing unbounded cascading aborts if shards fail prior to the end of replication. Our experimental evaluation on Azure shows that Mako processes 3.66M TPC-C transactions per second when data is split across 10 shards, each of which runs with 24 threads. This is an 8.6× higher throughput than state-of-the-art systems optimized for geo-replication.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Mako，一种高可用性、高吞吐量和水平可扩展的事务键值存储。 Mako 执行高度一致的异地复制，以在整个数据中心发生故障时保持可用性，使用多核机器进行快速可序列化事务处理，并对数据进行分片以进行横向扩展。为了实现这些属性，特别是为了克服异地复制设置中分布式事务的开销，Mako 将事务执行和复制解耦。这使得 Mako 能够以推测方式非常快速地运行事务，并在后台复制事务以使其具有容错能力。 Mako 的关键创新是推测性地使用两阶段提交 (2PC)，以允许分布式事务继续进行，而不必等待其决策被复制，同时如果分片在复制结束之前发生故障，还可以防止无限级联中止。我们在 Azure 上的实验评估表明，当数据分布在 10 个分片（每个分片运行 24 个线程）时，Mako 每秒处理 366 万个 TPC-C 事务。这比针对地理复制进行优化的最先进系统的吞吐量高出 8.6 倍。

papers.title: MettEagle: Costs and Benefits of Implementing Containers on Microkernels.
papers.abstract: Today, many applications are hosted by cloud providers. In order to isolate the workloads of different clients, cloud enterprises mostly rely on containers rather than standard processes, since the latter are able to exercise a lot of ambient authority. Containers counter this deficiency by sandboxing processes. To this end, they use dedicated security mechanisms such as seccomp-bpf. However, these mechanisms add complexity to the kernel and increase its attack surface, thus prompting new security challenges. Processes in microkernel-based systems do not have ambient authority. Thus, they do not require additional security mechanisms to build sandboxes. In this paper, we try to answer the question whether a microkernel-based OS architecture enables a leaner and more secure container infrastructure. Based on a CVE analysis, we show that the conceptual simplicity of containers on microkernels results in a better security posture than that typically found on monolithic systems. We furthermore demonstrate the practical feasibility of implementing containers on state-of-the-art microkernels by building MettEagle, a prototype container service running on L4Re. We found that applications running in containers on L4Re expose performance characteristics comparable to that of containers on Linux for both synthetic and real-world benchmarks. In some cases, the container implementation of L4Re even outperforms Linux, accelerating container startup latency and improving network performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，许多应用程序由云提供商托管。为了隔离不同客户端的工作负载，云企业主要依赖于容器而不是标准流程，因为后者能够行使大量环境权限。容器通过沙箱进程来弥补这一缺陷。为此，他们使用专用的安全机制，例如 seccomp-bpf。然而，这些机制增加了内核的复杂性并增加了其攻击面，从而引发了新的安全挑战。基于微内核的系统中的进程没有环境权限。因此，他们不需要额外的安全机制来构建沙箱。在本文中，我们试图回答基于微内核的操作系统架构是否能够实现更精简、更安全的容器基础设施的问题。基于 CVE 分析，我们表明，微内核上的容器概念简单，可带来比单体系统上通常情况下更好的安全状况。此外，我们还通过构建 MettEagle（在 L4Re 上运行的原型容器服务）来展示在最先进的微内核上实现容器的实际可行性。我们发现，在 L4Re 上的容器中运行的应用程序的性能特征与 Linux 上的容器的性能特征相当，无论是在综合基准测试还是实际基准测试中。在某些情况下，L4Re的容器实现甚至优于Linux，加速了容器启动延迟并提高了网络性能。

papers.title: Mirage: A Multi-Level Superoptimizer for Tensor Programs.
papers.abstract: We introduce Mirage, the first multi-level superoptimizer for tensor programs. A key idea in Mirage is $μ$Graphs, a uniform representation of tensor programs at the kernel, thread block, and thread levels of the GPU compute hierarchy. $μ$Graphs enable Mirage to discover novel optimizations that combine algebraic transformations, schedule transformations, and generation of new custom kernels. To navigate the large search space, Mirage introduces a pruning technique based on abstraction that significantly reduces the search space and provides a certain optimality guarantee. To ensure that the optimized $μ$Graph is equivalent to the input program, Mirage introduces a probabilistic equivalence verification procedure with strong theoretical guarantees. Our evaluation shows that Mirage outperforms existing approaches by up to 3.3$\times$ even for DNNs that are widely used and heavily optimized. Mirage is publicly available at https://github.com/mirage-project/mirage.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出 Mirage，第一个用于张量程序的多级超级优化器。 Mirage 的一个关键思想是 $μ$Graphs，它是 GPU 计算层次结构的内核、线程块和线程级别的张量程序的统一表示。 $μ$Graphs 使 Mirage 能够发现结合代数变换、调度变换和新自定义内核生成的新颖优化。为了导航大搜索空间，Mirage 引入了基于抽象的剪枝技术，可显着减少搜索空间并提供一定的最优性保证。为了确保优化后的$μ$Graph与输入程序等价，Mirage引入了具有强大理论保证的概率等价验证程序。我们的评估表明，即使对于广泛使用和深度优化的 DNN，Mirage 的性能也比现有方法高出 3.3$\times$。 Mirage 可在 https://github.com/mirage-project/mirage 上公开获取。

papers.title: NanoFlow: Towards Optimal Large Language Model Serving Throughput.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have resulted in a surging demand for planet-scale serving systems, where tens of thousands of GPUs continuously serve hundreds of millions of users. Consequently, throughput has emerged as a key metric that determines serving systems' performance. Due to large model sizes and memory-intensive self-attention, LLM serving has been commonly assumed to be memory-bound. Through a detailed analysis, we show that despite having memory-intensive components, end-to-end LLM serving is compute bound for most common workloads and LLMs. Alas, most existing serving engines fall short from optimal compute utilization, because the heterogeneous operations that comprise LLM serving--compute, memory, networking--are executed sequentially within a device. We propose NanoFlow, a novel serving framework that exploits intra-device parallelism, which overlaps the usage of heterogeneous resources within a single device. NanoFlow splits inputs into smaller nano-batches and duplicates operations to operate on each portion independently, enabling overlapping. NanoFlow automatically identifies the number, size, ordering, and GPU resource allocation of nano-batches to minimize the execution time, while considering the interference of concurrent operations. We evaluate NanoFlow's end-to-end serving throughput on several popular models such as LLaMA-2-70B, Mixtral 8x7B, LLaMA-3-8B, etc. With practical workloads, NanoFlow provides 1.91x throughput boost compared to state-of-the-art serving systems achieving 50% to 72% of optimal throughput across popular models.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 导致了对全球服务系统的需求激增，其中数以万计的 GPU 持续为数亿用户提供服务。因此，吞吐量已成为决定服务系统性能的关键指标。由于模型尺寸较大和内存密集型自注意力机制，LLM 服务通常被认为是受内存限制的。通过详细分析，我们表明，尽管具有内存密集型组件，但端到端 LLM 服务对于大多数常见工作负载和 LLM 来说都是计算限制的。遗憾的是，大多数现有服务引擎都无法实现最佳计算利用率，因为构成 LLM 服务的异构操作（计算、内存、网络）是在设备内按顺序执行的。我们提出了 NanoFlow，一种利用设备内并行性的新颖服务框架，它与单个设备内异构资源的使用重叠。 NanoFlow 将输入分割成更小的纳米批次，并重复操作以独立地对每个部分进行操作，从而实现重叠。 NanoFlow自动识别纳米批次的数量、大小、顺序和GPU资源分配，以最大限度地减少执行时间，同时考虑并发操作的干扰。我们在 LLaMA-2-70B、Mixtral 8x7B、LLaMA-3-8B 等多种流行模型上评估了 NanoFlow 的端到端服务吞吐量。在实际工作负载下，NanoFlow 与最先进的服务系统相比，吞吐量提高了 1.91 倍，在流行模型中实现了最佳吞吐量的 50% 至 72%。

papers.title: Neutrino: Fine-grained GPU Kernel Profiling via Programmable Probing.
papers.abstract: As GPUs play an increasingly important role in computer systems in the scaling laws era, understanding fine-grained GPU runtime behavior is more crucial than ever. However, existing GPU kernel profilers, typically kernel-exclusive or hardware-dependent, often fail to capture fine-grained measurements. This paper presents NEUTRINO, a programmable interface for GPU kernel profiling that leverages assembly-layer probing to achieve instruction-level fine granularity, profiling versatility across time and value domains, and hardware independence. To better visualize the rich details captured by NEUTRINO, we introduce the Densified Memory Access Timeline (DMAT), a novel representation that offers new insights into GPU runtime behavior. We implement NEUTRINO in Linux for both NVIDIA and AMD GPUs and conduct extensive evaluations and analyses. The results demonstrate NEUTRINO’s superior capabilities in GPU kernel profiling with low overhead. We envision NEUTRINO as a valuable tool for the community and have open-sourced it to facilitate future research at https://github.com/open-neutrino/neutrino .
papers.abstract_zh: 随着 GPU 在缩放定律时代的计算机系统中发挥着越来越重要的作用，了解细粒度 GPU 运行时行为比以往任何时候都更加重要。然而，现有的 GPU 内核分析器（通常是内核专有的或依赖于硬件的）通常无法捕获细粒度的测量。本文介绍了 NEUTRINO，一种用于 GPU 内核分析的可编程接口，它利用汇编层探测来实现指令级细粒度、跨时间和值域的分析多功能性以及硬件独立性。为了更好地可视化 NEUTRINO 捕获的丰富细节，我们引入了密集内存访问时间线 (DMAT)，这是一种新颖的表示形式，可为 GPU 运行时行为提供新的见解。我们在 Linux 中为 NVIDIA 和 AMD GPU 实施 NEUTRINO，并进行广泛的评估和分析。结果证明了 NEUTRINO 在 GPU 内核分析方面具有较低开销的卓越能力。我们希望 NEUTRINO 成为社区的一个有价值的工具，并在 https://github.com/open-neutrino/neutrino 上将其开源以促进未来的研究。

papers.title: Okapi: Decoupling Data Striping and Redundancy Grouping in Cluster File Systems.
papers.abstract: The Okapi cluster file system decouples how data is spread across disks (data striping) for IO efficiency from how data is erasure coded together (redundancy grouping) for durability. Existing systems couple these two mechanisms’ configurations, inducing significant inefficiencies. Decoupling allows grouping to be configured based on reliability and space efficiency goals, while simultaneously allowing striping to be configured based on performance goals. Decoupling also allows redundancy scheme changes from one EC scheme to another (e.g., to react to data temperature or disk failure rate changes) to occur without having to re-write data. Evaluation of an Okapi prototype shows that decoupling can be accomplished with <1% increase in metadata size and file manager memory, and minimal file creation and degraded read resource increase. Experiments demonstrate that decoupling can improve read throughput by 80% and reduce seeks per second by up to 70%, without yielding any data reliability, and reduce the overhead of redundancy transitions by up to 70%.
papers.abstract_zh: Okapi 集群文件系统将数据在磁盘上的分布方式（数据条带化）与数据的纠删码方式（冗余分组）分离以实现 IO 效率和持久性。现有系统将这两种机制的配置结合在一起，导致效率显着低下。解耦允许根据可靠性和空间效率目标配置分组，同时允许根据性能目标配置条带化。解耦还允许冗余方案从一种 EC 方案更改为另一种方案（例如，对数据温度或磁盘故障率变化做出反应），而无需重新写入数据。对 Okapi 原型的评估表明，可以通过元数据大小和文件管理器内存增加 <1% 以及最少的文件创建和降级读取资源增加来实现解耦。实验表明，解耦可以将读取吞吐量提高 80%，将每秒寻道次数减少多达 70%，而不会产生任何数据可靠性，并将冗余转换的开销减少多达 70%。

papers.title: OS Rendering Service Made Parallel with Out-of-Order Execution and In-Order Commit.
papers.abstract: Rendering service is an indispensable OS service on smart-device OSes like Android, iOS and OpenHarmony. However, the recent shift towards highly scalable display scenarios, such as foldable and multiple screens, has notably amplified the rendering workload, leading to low frame rates that degrade user experience. Yet, rendering services predominantly follow a sequential model, which is notoriously hard to parallelize due to the complex state dependency, drawing order dependency, and interface dependency. This paper observes that a significant portion of the rendering procedure is potentially parallelizable through proper state pre-untangling and drawing order post-preserving. To this end, this paper introduces Spars, a scalable parallelized OS rendering service inspired by the out-of-order execution with in-order commit in computer architecture. Spars revolutionizes the rendering procedure by initially generating self-contained rendering tasks through in-order preparation, executing such tasks in an out-of-order manner to maximize multi-core parallelism, and subsequently committing the tasks in-order to enforce drawing order dependencies. Evaluation results on state-of-the-art single-screen, dual-fold, and tri-fold smartphones (Mate 70, X5, XT) as well as one-chip-multiple-screen configurations show an average frame rate improvement of 1.76×–1.91×. Moreover, Spars is able to decrease the device power consumption by 3.0% or increase the budget of graphics primitives by 2.31× for more appealing visual effects with the same stable frame rate.
papers.abstract_zh: 渲染服务是Android、iOS、OpenHarmony等智能设备操作系统上不可或缺的操作系统服务。然而，最近向高度可扩展的显示场景（例如可折叠和多屏幕）的转变显着增加了渲染工作量，导致低帧速率，从而降低了用户体验。然而，渲染服务主要遵循顺序模型，由于复杂的状态依赖性、绘制顺序依赖性和接口依赖性，该模型很难并行化。本文观察到，渲染过程的很大一部分可以通过适当的状态预解开和绘制顺序后保留来实现并行化。为此，本文介绍了 Spars，这是一种可扩展的并行操作系统渲染服务，其灵感来自计算机体系结构中的乱序执行和按序提交。 Spars 彻底改变了渲染过程，首先通过按顺序准备生成独立的渲染任务，以无序方式执行此类任务以最大化多核并行性，然后按顺序提交任务以强制绘制顺序依赖性。对最先进的单屏、双屏和三屏智能手机（Mate 70、X5、XT）以及单芯片多屏配置的评估结果显示，平均帧率提高了 1.76×–1.91×。此外，Spars能够将设备功耗降低3.0%，或将图形基元预算增加2.31倍，在相同稳定的帧率下获得更吸引人的视觉效果。

papers.title: Paralegal: Practical Static Analysis for Privacy Bugs.
papers.abstract:
Finding privacy bugs in software today usually requires onerous manual audits. Code analysis tools could help, but existing tools aren’t sufficiently practical and ergonomic to be used.

Paralegal is a static analysis tool to find privacy bugs in Rust programs. Key to Paralegal’s practicality is its distribution of work between the program analyzer, privacy engineers, and application developers. Privacy engineers express a high-level privacy policy over markers, which application developers then apply to source code entities. Paralegal extracts a Program Dependence Graph (PDG) from the program, leveraging Rust’s ownership type system to model the behavior of library code. Paralegal augments the PDG with the developers’ markers and checks privacy policies against the marked PDG.

In an evaluation on eight real-world applications, Paralegal found real privacy bugs, including two previously unknown ones. Paralegal supports a broader range of policies than information flow control (IFC) and CodeQL, a widely-used code analysis engine. Paralegal is fast enough to deploy interactively, and its markers are easy to maintain as code evolves.
papers.abstract_zh:
如今，查找软件中的隐私漏洞通常需要繁重的手动审核。代码分析工具可以提供帮助，但现有工具的实用性和人体工程学不够实用。

Paralegal 是一个静态分析工具，用于查找 Rust 程序中的隐私错误。律师助理实用性的关键在于它在程序分析器、隐私工程师和应用程序开发人员之间分配工作。隐私工程师通过标记表达高级隐私策略，然后应用程序开发人员将其应用于源代码实体。律师助理从程序中提取程序依赖图（PDG），利用 Rust 的所有权类型系统对库代码的行为进行建模。律师助理使用开发人员的标记来增强 PDG，并根据标记的 PDG 检查隐私政策。

在对八个实际应用程序的评估中，律师助理发现了真正的隐私漏洞，其中包括两个以前未知的漏洞。律师助理支持比信息流控制 (IFC) 和广泛使用的代码分析引擎 CodeQL 更广泛的策略。律师助理的速度足够快，可以交互式部署，而且随着代码的发展，其标记也很容易维护。

papers.title: Picsou: Enabling Replicated State Machines to Communicate Efficiently.
papers.abstract: Replicated state machines (RSMs) cannot communicate effectively today as there is no formal framework or efficient protocol to do so. To address this issue, we introduce a new primitive, Cross-Cluster Consistent Broadcast (C3B) and present PICSOU, a practical implementation of the C3B primitive. PICSOU draws inspiration from networking and TCP to allow two RSMs to communicate with constant metadata overhead in the failure-free case and a minimal number of message resends in the case of failures. PICSOU is flexible and allows both crash fault tolerant and Byzantine fault tolerant consensus protocols to communicate. At the heart of PICSOU's good performance and generality is the concept of QUACKs (quorum acknowledgments). QUACKs allow nodes in each RSM to precisely determine when messages have definitely been received, or likely lost. Our results are promising: we obtain up to 24x better performance than prior solutions on microbenchmarks and applications, ranging from disaster recovery to data reconciliation.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，复制状态机 (RSM) 无法有效地进行通信，因为没有正式的框架或有效的协议来实现这一点。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新的原语，跨集群一致广播（C3B），并提出了 PICSOU，这是 C3B 原语的实际实现。 PICSOU 从网络和 TCP 中汲取灵感，允许两个 RSM 在无故障情况下以恒定的元数据开销进行通信，并在发生故障时以最少数量的消息重新发送。 PICSOU 非常灵活，允许崩溃容错和拜占庭容错共识协议进行通信。 PICSOU 良好性能和通用性的核心是 QUACK（法定人数确认）的概念。 QUACK 允许每个 RSM 中的节点精确确定消息何时已明确收到或可能丢失。我们的结果令人鼓舞：我们在微基准测试和应用程序（从灾难恢复到数据协调）方面获得了比以前的解决方案高出 24 倍的性能。

papers.title: PipeThreader: Software-Defined Pipelining for Efficient DNN Execution.
papers.abstract: To effectively utilize heterogeneous specialized hardware units in modern GPUs, such as TensorCores and Tensor Memory Accelerators, this paper introduces PipeThreader, a new DNN compiler. PipeThreader proposes shifting scheduling functionality from hardware to software so as to enable more efficient and sophisticated computation pipelining with minimal manual effort. This is achieved through sTask-graph, a new DNN computation abstraction, a hierarchical hardware abstraction that captures the capabilities of specialized units, and new scheduling primitives. As a result, PipeThreader can discover efficient pipeline scheduling for well-studied DNN architectures like FlashAttention, achieving comparable or even superior performance. Additionally, it can uncover novel pipeline schemes for emerging models like Mamba2, delivering significantly better performance compared to state-of-the-art hand-crafted implementations. The code is open-sourced at https://github.com/tile-ai/tilelang .
papers.abstract_zh: 为了有效利用现代 GPU 中的异构专用硬件单元（例如 TensorCore 和张量内存加速器），本文引入了 PipeThreader，一种新的 DNN 编译器。 PipeThreader 建议将调度功能从硬件转移到软件，以便以最少的手动工作实现更高效、更复杂的计算流水线。这是通过 sTask-graph 实现的，sTask-graph 是一种新的 DNN 计算抽象、一种捕获专用单元功能的分层硬件抽象以及新的调度原语。因此，PipeThreader 可以为经过充分研究的 DNN 架构（如 FlashAttention）发现高效的管道调度，从而实现可比甚至卓越的性能。此外，它还可以为 Mamba2 等新兴模型发现新颖的管道方案，与最先进的手工实现相比，提供显着更好的性能。该代码在 https://github.com/tile-ai/tilelang 上开源。

papers.title: PoWER Never Corrupts: Tool-Agnostic Verification of Crash Consistency and Corruption Detection.
papers.abstract: Storage systems must maintain integrity even after rare and difficult-to-test-for conditions like power losses and media errors. Formal verification presents a promising avenue to ensure storage systems are resilient, but current approaches involve significant complexity and rely on verification constructs or forms of logic beyond what most verifiers natively support. In this paper, we present two new verification techniques that rely only on standard constructs provided by most verification tools such as Hoare logic, ghost variables, and quantifiers. First, we introduce PoWER (Preconditions on Writes Enforcing Recoverability), a novel approach to verifying crash consistency that encodes its requirements in the preconditions of storage API methods. Second, we present a new model of media corruption for provable corruption detection on any type of storage device. To demonstrate the power of these new techniques, we use them to build two verified storage systems using two different verification frameworks. We build and verify the key-value (KV) store CapybaraKV using Verus and the notary server CapybaraNS using Dafny. Both systems are built for persistent memory (PM), which we target due to new challenges it presents to building resilient storage systems. We develop new techniques to address these challenges, including the corruption-detecting Boolean , a new primitive for atomic checksum updates. Both systems verify in under a minute, and CapybaraKV achieves performance competitive with similar unverified PM KV stores.
papers.abstract_zh: 即使在出现断电和介质错误等罕见且难以测试的情况后，存储系统也必须保持完整性。形式验证为确保存储系统具有弹性提供了一种有前途的途径，但当前的方法涉及相当大的复杂性，并且依赖于超出大多数验证者本身支持的验证结构或逻辑形式。在本文中，我们提出了两种新的验证技术，这些技术仅依赖于大多数验证工具（例如霍尔逻辑、幽灵变量和量词）提供的标准结构。首先，我们介绍 PoWER（强制可恢复性写入的前提条件），这是一种验证崩溃一致性的新颖方法，它将其要求编码在存储 API 方法的前提条件中。其次，我们提出了一种新的媒体损坏模型，用于在任何类型的存储设备上进行可证明的损坏检测。为了展示这些新技术的强大功能，我们使用它们构建了两个使用两种不同验证框架的经过验证的存储系统。我们使用 Verus 构建并验证键值 (KV) 存储 CapybaraKV，并使用 Dafny 构建和验证公证服务器 CapybaraNS。这两个系统都是为持久内存（PM）而构建的，我们的目标是持久内存，因为它给构建弹性存储系统带来了新的挑战。我们开发了新技术来应对这些挑战，包括腐败检测布尔值，这是一种用于原子校验和更新的新原语。两个系统都在一分钟内完成验证，CapybaraKV 的性能可与类似的未经验证的 PM KV 存储相媲美。

papers.title: Principles and Methodologies for Serial Performance Optimization.
papers.abstract:
Throughout the history of computer science, optimizing existing systems to achieve higher performance has been a longstanding aspiration. While the primary emphasis of this endeavor lies in reducing latency and increasing throughput, these two are closely intertwined, and answering the how question has remained a challenge, often relying on intuition and experience.

This paper introduces a systematic approach to optimizing sequential tasks, which are fundamental for overall performance. We define three principles—task removal, replacement, and reordering—and distill them into eight actionable methodologies: batching, caching, precomputing, deferring, relaxation, contextualization, hardware specialization, and layering. Our review of OSDI and SOSP papers over the past decade shows that these techniques, when taken together, comprehensively account for the observed sequential optimization strategies.

To illustrate the framework’s practical value, we present two case studies: one on file and storage systems, and another analyzing kernel synchronization to uncover missed optimization opportunities. Furthermore, we introduce SysGPT, a fine-tuned GPT model trained on curated literature analysis, which offer context-aware performance suggestions. SysGPT’s outputs are more specific and feasible than GPT-4’s, aligning with core strategies from recent research without direct exposure, demonstrating its utility as an optimization assistant.
papers.abstract_zh:
纵观计算机科学的历史，优化现有系统以获得更高的性能一直是一个长期的愿望。虽然这项工作的主要重点在于减少延迟和提高吞吐量，但这两者紧密相连，并且回答“如何”问题仍然是一个挑战，通常依赖于直觉和经验。

本文介绍了一种优化顺序任务的系统方法，这对于整体性能至关重要。我们定义了三个原则——任务删除、替换和重新排序——并将它们提炼成八种可操作的方法：批处理、缓存、预计算、延迟、松弛、上下文化、硬件专业化和分层。我们对过去十年 OSDI 和 SOSP 论文的回顾表明，这些技术综合起来可以全面解释观察到的顺序优化策略。

为了说明该框架的实用价值，我们提供了两个案例研究：一个关于文件和存储系统，另一个分析内核同步以发现错过的优化机会。此外，我们还引入了 SysGPT，这是一种经过精心策划的文献分析训练的微调 GPT 模型，可提供上下文感知的性能建议。 SysGPT 的输出比 GPT-4 的输出更具体、更可行，与最近研究的核心策略保持一致，无需直接暴露，展示了其作为优化助手的实用性。

papers.title: QiMeng-Xpiler: Transcompiling Tensor Programs for Deep Learning Systems with a Neural-Symbolic Approach.
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous deep learning systems (DLS) such as GPUs and ASICs have been widely deployed in industrial data centers, which requires to develop multiple low-level tensor programs for different platforms. An attractive solution to relieve the programming burden is to transcompile the legacy code of one platform to others. However, current transcompilation techniques struggle with either tremendous manual efforts or functional incorrectness, rendering "Write Once, Run Anywhere" of tensor programs an open question. We propose a novel transcompiler, i.e., QiMeng-Xpiler, for automatically translating tensor programs across DLS via both large language models (LLMs) and symbolic program synthesis, i.e., neural-symbolic synthesis. The key insight is leveraging the powerful code generation ability of LLM to make costly search-based symbolic synthesis computationally tractable. Concretely, we propose multiple LLM-assisted compilation passes via pre-defined meta-prompts for program transformation. During each program transformation, efficient symbolic program synthesis is employed to repair incorrect code snippets with a limited scale. To attain high performance, we propose a hierarchical auto-tuning approach to systematically explore both the parameters and sequences of transformation passes. Experiments on 4 DLS with distinct programming interfaces, i.e., Intel DL Boost with VNNI, NVIDIA GPU with CUDA, AMD MI with HIP, and Cambricon MLU with BANG, demonstrate that QiMeng-Xpiler correctly translates different tensor programs at the accuracy of 95% on average, and the performance of translated programs achieves up to 2.0x over vendor-provided manually-optimized libraries. As a result, the programming productivity of DLS is improved by up to 96.0x via transcompiling legacy tensor programs.
papers.abstract_zh: GPU和ASIC等异构深度学习系统（DLS）已广泛部署在工业数据中心中，这需要为不同平台开发多个低级张量程序。减轻编程负担的一种有吸引力的解决方案是将一个平台的遗留代码转编译到其他平台。然而，当前的转编译技术要么面临巨大的手动工作，要么遇到功能错误，使得张量程序的“一次编写，随处运行”成为一个悬而未决的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的转编译器，即 QiMeng-Xpiler，用于通过大语言模型（LLM）和符号程序合成（即神经符号合成）在 DLS 上自动翻译张量程序。关键的见解是利用法学硕士强大的代码生成能力，使昂贵的基于搜索的符号合成在计算上易于处理。具体来说，我们通过预定义的元提示来建议多个 LLM 辅助编译过程以进行程序转换。在每次程序转换过程中，都会采用高效的符号程序合成来修复有限范围内的错误代码片段。为了获得高性能，我们提出了一种分层自动调整方法来系统地探索变换过程的参数和序列。在具有不同编程接口的 4 个 DLS（即带有 VNNI 的 Intel DL Boost、带有 CUDA 的 NVIDIA GPU、带有 HIP 的 AMD MI 和带有 BANG 的寒武纪 MLU）上进行的实验表明，QiMeng-Xpiler 能够以平均 95% 的准确率正确翻译不同的张量程序，并且翻译后的程序的性能比供应商提供的手动优化库高出 2.0 倍。因此，通过转编译遗留张量程序，DLS 的编程效率提高了高达 96.0 倍。

papers.title: QOS: Quantum Operating System.
papers.abstract: Quantum computers face challenges due to hardware constraints, noise errors, and heterogeneity, and face fundamental design tradeoffs between key performance metrics such as \textit{quantum fidelity} and system utilization. This substantially complicates managing quantum resources to scale the size and number of quantum algorithms that can be executed reliably in a given time. We introduce QOS, a cloud operating system for managing quantum resources while mitigating their inherent limitations and balancing the design tradeoffs of quantum computing. QOS exposes a hardware-agnostic API for transparent quantum job execution, mitigates hardware errors, and systematically multi-programs and schedules the jobs across space and time to achieve high quantum fidelity in a resource-efficient manner. To achieve this, it leverages two key insights: First, to maximize utilization and minimize fidelity loss, some jobs are more compatible than others for multi-programming on the same quantum computer. Second, sacrificing minimal fidelity can significantly reduce job waiting times. We evaluate QOS on real quantum devices hosted by IBM, using 7000 real quantum runs of more than 70.000 benchmark instances. We show that the QOS achieves 2.6--456.5$\times$ higher fidelity, increases resource utilization by up to 9.6$\times$, and reduces waiting times by up to 5$\times$ while sacrificing only 1--3\% fidelity, on average, compared to the baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子计算机面临着由于硬件限制、噪声误差和异质性而带来的挑战，并且面临着关键性能指标（例如\textit{量子保真度}）和系统利用率之间的基本设计权衡。这使得管理量子资源变得更加复杂，以扩展可以在给定时间内可靠执行的量子算法的大小和数量。我们引入了 QOS，这是一种云操作系统，用于管理量子资源，同时减轻其固有的局限性并平衡量子计算的设计权衡。 QOS 公开了一个与硬件无关的 API，用于透明的量子作业执行，减少硬件错误，并系统地跨空间和时间进行多程序和调度作业，以资源高效的方式实现高量子保真度。为了实现这一目标，它利用了两个关键的见解：首先，为了最大限度地提高利用率并最大限度地减少保真度损失，某些工作比其他工作更适合在同一台量子计算机上进行多重编程。其次，牺牲最低保真度可以显着减少作业等待时间。我们使用超过 70,000 个基准实​​例的 7000 次真实量子运行，在 IBM 托管的真实量子设备上评估 QOS。我们表明，与基线相比，QOS 的保真度平均提高了 2.6--456.5$\times$，资源利用率提高了高达 9.6$\times$，并减少了高达 5$\times$ 的等待时间，同时平均只牺牲了 1--3\% 的保真度。

papers.title: Quake: Adaptive Indexing for Vector Search.
papers.abstract: Vector search, the task of finding the k-nearest neighbors of a query vector against a database of high-dimensional vectors, underpins many machine learning applications, including retrieval-augmented generation, recommendation systems, and information retrieval. However, existing approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) methods perform poorly under dynamic and skewed workloads where data distributions evolve. We introduce Quake, an adaptive indexing system that maintains low latency and high recall in such environments. Quake employs a multi-level partitioning scheme that adjusts to updates and changing access patterns, guided by a cost model that predicts query latency based on partition sizes and access frequencies. Quake also dynamically sets query execution parameters to meet recall targets using a novel recall estimation model. Furthermore, Quake utilizes NUMA-aware intra-query parallelism for improved memory bandwidth utilization during search. To evaluate Quake, we prepare a Wikipedia vector search workload and develop a workload generator to create vector search workloads with configurable access patterns. Our evaluation shows that on dynamic workloads, Quake achieves query latency reductions of 1.5-38x and update latency reductions of 4.5-126x compared to state-of-the-art indexes such as SVS, DiskANN, HNSW, and SCANN.
papers.abstract_zh: 向量搜索是针对高维向量数据库查找查询向量的 k 最近邻的任务，它支撑着许多机器学习应用，包括检索增强生成、推荐系统和信息检索。然而，现有的近似最近邻（ANN）方法在数据分布不断变化的动态和倾斜工作负载下表现不佳。我们推出了 Quake，这是一种自适应索引系统，可以在此类环境中保持低延迟和高召回率。 Quake 采用多级分区方案，可根据更新和不断变化的访问模式进行调整，并以成本模型为指导，该模型根据分区大小和访问频率预测查询延迟。 Quake 还使用新颖的召回估计模型动态设置查询执行参数以满足召回目标。此外，Quake 利用 NUMA 感知的查询内并行性来提高搜索期间的内存带宽利用率。为了评估 Quake，我们准备了一个维基百科矢量搜索工作负载，并开发了一个工作负载生成器来创建具有可配置访问模式的矢量搜索工作负载。我们的评估表明，在动态工作负载上，与 SVS、DiskANN、HNSW 和 SCANN 等最先进的索引相比，Quake 的查询延迟降低了 1.5-38 倍，更新延迟降低了 4.5-126 倍。

papers.title: Quantum Virtual Machines.
papers.abstract: Cloud computing services offer time on quantum computers, but users are forced to each use the entire quantum computer to run their programs as there is no way to multiplex a quantum computer among multiple programs at the same time. We present HyperQ, a system that introduces virtual machines for quantum computers to provide fault isolation, better resource utilization, and lower latency for quantum cloud computing. A quantum virtual machine is defined in terms of quantum computer hardware, specifically its quantum gates and qubits arranged in a hardware-specific topology. HyperQ enables quantum virtual machines to be simultaneously executed together on a quantum computer by multiplexing them in time and space on the hardware and ensuring that they are isolated from one another. HyperQ works with existing quantum programs and compiler frameworks; programs are simply compiled to run in virtual machines without the programs or compilers needing to know what else might be executed at the same time. We have implemented HyperQ for the IBM quantum computing service, the largest quantum computing fleet in the world. Our experimental results running quantum programs in virtual machines using the IBM service demonstrate that HyperQ can increase utilization and throughput while reducing program latency, by up to an order of magnitude, without sacrificing, and in some cases improving, fidelity in the results of quantum program execution.
papers.abstract_zh: 云计算服务在量子计算机上提供时间，但用户被迫每个人都使用整个量子计算机来运行他们的程序，因为无法同时在多个程序之间复用一台量子计算机。我们推出了 HyperQ，这是一个为量子计算机引入虚拟机的系统，可为量子云计算提供故障隔离、更好的资源利用率和更低的延迟。量子虚拟机是根据量子计算机硬件定义的，特别是按特定于硬件的拓扑排列的量子门和量子位。 HyperQ 通过在硬件上在时间和空间上复用量子虚拟机并确保它们彼此隔离，使量子虚拟机能够在一台量子计算机上同时执行。 HyperQ 可与现有量子程序和编译器框架配合使用；程序被简单地编译为在虚拟机中运行，而不需要程序或编译器知道同时可能执行什么。我们已经为 IBM 量子计算服务（世界上最大的量子计算集群）实施了 HyperQ。我们使用 IBM 服务在虚拟机中运行量子程序的实验结果表明，HyperQ 可以提高利用率和吞吐量，同时将程序延迟减少一个数量级，而不会牺牲（在某些情况下还可以提高）量子程序执行结果的保真度。

papers.title: Scalio: Scaling up DPU-based JBOF Key-value Store with NVMe-oF Target Offload.
papers.abstract:
The rapid growth of data-intensive applications has created a demand for high-density storage systems. Data-Processing-Unit-based (DPU-based) Just a Bunch of Flash (JBOF) solutions provide an energy-efficient and cost-effective architecture to meet this need. However, existing JBOF solutions struggle with scalability when handling an increasing number of attached SSDs, due to their heavy reliance on the DPU's CPU for SSD I/O operations.

In this paper, we introduce Scalio, a scalable disaggregated key-value store designed to address the limitations of current DPU-based JBOF systems. Scalio offloads as many SSD I/O operations as possible to the DPU's network I/O capabilities, including traditional RDMA verbs and a recent hardware optimization, NVMe over Fabrics Target Offload. Additionally, Scalio incorporates a two-layer design with compact in-memory data structures to handle hot read traffic and manage bursty writes. One of the key challenges in this design is ensuring consistency between the DRAM states in the DPU and the SSD states, which, unlike CPU L1/L2 caches, are not automatically synchronized through hardware cache coherence protocols. To address this, Scalio introduces an RDMA-based cache consistency protocol that guarantees linearizability across the system, despite the disaggregated nature of the architecture.

Our experiments show that Scalio significantly improves both scalability and throughput, achieving up to 3.3× higher throughput compared to existing systems, especially in high-density SSD configurations.
papers.abstract_zh:
数据密集型应用的快速增长产生了对高密度存储系统的需求。基于数据处理单元（基于 DPU）的 Just a Bunch of Flash (JBOF) 解决方案提供了一种节能且经济高效的架构来满足这一需求。然而，现有的 JBOF 解决方案在处理越来越多的附加 SSD 时难以实现可扩展性，因为它们严重依赖 DPU 的 CPU 来进行 SSD I/O 操作。

在本文中，我们介绍了 Scalio，这是一种可扩展的分类键值存储，旨在解决当前基于 DPU 的 JBOF 系统的局限性。 Scalio 将尽可能多的 SSD I/O 操作卸载到 DPU 的网络 I/O 功能，包括传统的 RDMA 动词和最近的硬件优化 NVMe over Fabrics Target Offload。此外，Scalio 采用两层设计和紧凑的内存数据结构来处理热读取流量并管理突发写入。此设计的关键挑战之一是确保 DPU 中的 DRAM 状态和 SSD 状态之间的一致性，与 CPU L1/L2 缓存不同，它们不会通过硬件缓存一致性协议自动同步。为了解决这个问题，Scalio 引入了基于 RDMA 的缓存一致性协议，尽管架构具有分解性质，但仍能保证整个系统的线性化。

我们的实验表明，Scalio 显着提高了可扩展性和吞吐量，与现有系统相比，吞吐量提高了 3.3 倍，特别是在高密度 SSD 配置中。

papers.title: Skybridge: Bounded Staleness for Distributed Caches.
papers.abstract:
Meta Platforms Inc. is a social media company whose products require high availability and low latency. Meta’s services run in multiple geographic locations around the world and use asynchronous replication to keep the numerous cached copies of the datastore in sync. This setup reduces consistency in order to meet availability and latency requirements. Eventual consistency due to asynchronous replication causes issues for Meta’s services, ranging from minor annoyances to product-breaking bugs. Therefore, we ask: can we put meaningful bounds on how long it takes writes to be visible while maintaining the scalability afforded by eventual consistency?

In this work we present Skybridge, an out-of-band replication stream for providing bounded staleness for distributed caches. Skybridge takes advantage of the fact that Meta’s systems already have a reliable delivery stream and instead focuses on real-time delivery of updates. Skybridge is complementary to the main replication pipeline and avoids correlated failures while being lightweight. We show that Skybridge helps provide 2-second bounded staleness for 99.99998% of writes, while the main replication pipeline only achieves this 99.993% of the time. Skybridge is able to achieve this while only being 0.54% the size of cache deployments.
papers.abstract_zh:
Meta Platforms Inc. 是一家社交媒体公司，其产品需要高可用性和低延迟。 Meta 的服务在世界各地的多个地理位置运行，并使用异步复制来保持数据存储的大量缓存副本同步。此设置会降低一致性，以满足可用性和延迟要求。异步复制导致的最终一致性会给 Meta 的服务带来问题，从轻微的烦恼到破坏产品的错误。因此，我们问：我们能否对写入可见所需的时间设置有意义的界限，同时保持最终一致性提供的可扩展性？

在这项工作中，我们提出了 Skybridge，一种带外复制流，用于为分布式缓存提供有限的过时性。 Skybridge 利用了 Meta 系统已经拥有可靠的交付流这一事实，转而专注于更新的实时交付。 Skybridge 是对主复制管道的补充，在轻量级的同时避免了相关故障。我们表明 Skybridge 有助于为 99.99998% 的写入提供 2 秒有限的过时性，而主复制管道仅在 99.993% 的时间内实现这一点。 Skybridge 能够实现这一目标，同时其规模仅为缓存部署的 0.54%。

papers.title: Stripeless Data Placement for Erasure-Coded In-Memory Storage.
papers.abstract:
Erasure coding plays a crucial role in distributed storage systems to provide fault tolerance at a low storage cost. Conventional erasure coding schemes are based on stripes. However, placing data into stripes can incur non-negligible performance overheads that will manifest in emerging fast in-memory storage systems, making conventional erasure coding schemes suboptimal in such scenarios.

Aiming to eliminate such overheads, we present Nos, a stripeless erasure coding scheme. It lets each node in the storage system independently replicate data to other nodes and encode received data replica into parities with XOR. Thus, Nos avoids the overheads caused by stripes. To enable failure recovery, Nos uses a combinatoric structure called symmetric balanced incomplete block design (SBIBD) to decide primary-to-backup node affinities during replication. Atop Nos, we further build Nostor, a distributed in-memory key-value store. Evaluations demonstrate that Nostor achieves 1.61x and 2.60x throughputs with similar or lower latencies than stripe-based erasure coding baselines.
papers.abstract_zh:
纠删码在分布式存储系统中起着至关重要的作用，可以以较低的存储成本提供容错能力。传统的纠删码方案基于条带。然而，将数据放入条带中可能会产生不可忽略的性能开销，这将在新兴的快速内存存储系统中体现出来，使得传统的纠删码方案在这种情况下不是最佳的。

为了消除此类开销，我们提出了 Nos，一种无条带擦除编码方案。它让存储系统中的每个节点独立地将数据复制到其他节点，并使用 XOR 将接收到的数据副本编码为奇偶校验。因此，Nos 避免了条纹带来的开销。为了实现故障恢复，Nos 使用称为对称平衡不完整块设计 (SBIBD) 的组合结构来决定复制期间的主节点与备份节点的关联性。在此基础上，我们进一步构建了 Nostor，一个分布式内存键值存储。评估表明，与基于条带的纠删码基线相比，Nostor 的吞吐量提高了 1.61 倍和 2.60 倍，而延迟却相似或更低。

papers.title: Söze: One Network Telemetry Is All You Need for Per-flow Weighted Bandwidth Allocation at Scale.
papers.abstract: Weighted bandwidth allocation is a powerful abstraction that has a wide range of use cases in modern data center networks. However, realizing highly agile and precise weighted bandwidth allocation for large-scale cloud environments is fundamentally challenging. In this paper, we propose Söze, a lightweight decentralized weighted bandwidth allocation system that leverages simple network telemetry features of commodity Ethernet switches. Given the flow weights, Söze can effectively use the telemetry information to compute and enforce the weighted bandwidth allocations without per-flow, topology, or routing knowledge. We demonstrate the effectiveness of Söze through simulations and testbed experiments, improving TPC-H jobs completion time by up to $0.59\times$ and $0.79\times$ on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 加权带宽分配是一种强大的抽象，在现代数据中心网络中具有广泛的用例。然而，为大规模云环境实现高度敏捷和精确的加权带宽分配具有根本性的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 Söze，这是一种轻量级的去中心化加权带宽分配系统，它利用了商用以太网交换机的简单网络遥测功能。给定流权重，Söze 可以有效地使用遥测信息来计算和实施加权带宽分配，而无需了解每个流、拓扑或路由知识。我们通过模拟和测试台实验证明了 Söze 的有效性，将 TPC-H 作业完成时间平均提高了 0.59 美元和 0.79 美元。

papers.title: Tiered Memory Management Beyond Hotness.
papers.abstract: Tiered memory systems often rely on access frequency (''hotness'') to guide data placement. However, hot data is not always performance-critical, limiting the effectiveness of hotness-based policies. We introduce amortized offcore latency (AOL), a novel metric that precisely captures the true performance impact of memory accesses by accounting for memory access latency and memory-level parallelism (MLP). Leveraging AOL, we present two powerful tiering mechanisms: SOAR, a profile-guided allocation policy that places objects based on their performance contribution, and ALTO, a lightweight page migration regulation policy to eliminate unnecessary migrations. SOAR and ALTO outperform four state-of-the-art tiering designs across a diverse set of workloads by up to 12.4×, while underperforming in a few cases by no more than 3%.
papers.abstract_zh: 分层内存系统通常依靠访问频率（“热度”）来指导数据放置。然而，热数据并不总是对性能至关重要，限制了基于热度的策略的有效性。我们引入了摊销核外延迟 (AOL)，这是一种新颖的指标，可通过考虑内存访问延迟和内存级并行性 (MLP) 来精确捕获内存访问的真实性能影响。利用 AOL，我们提出了两种强大的分层机制：SOAR（一种基于配置文件引导的分配策略，根据对象的性能贡献来放置对象）和 ALTO（一种轻量级页面迁移调节策略，用于消除不必要的迁移）。 SOAR 和 ALTO 在各种不同的工作负载中的性能比四种最先进的分层设计高出 12.4 倍，而在少数情况下表现不佳，不超过 3%。

papers.title: Tigon: A Distributed Database for a CXL Pod.
papers.abstract:
Building efficient distributed transactional databases remains a challenging problem despite decades of research. Existing distributed databases synchronize cross-host concurrent data accesses over a network, which requires numerous message exchanges and introduces performance overhead.

We describe Tigon, the first distributed in-memory database that synchronizes cross-host concurrent data accesses using atomic operations on CXL memory. Using CXL memory is more efficient than network-based approaches, however, Tigon must address the limitations of CXL memory. The limitations are CXL’s higher latency and lower bandwidth relative to local DRAM, and its limited hardware support for cross-host cache coherence. For TPC-C and a variant of YCSB, Tigon achieves up to 2.5× higher throughput compared with two optimized shared-nothing databases that use CXL memory as a transport and up to 18.5× higher throughput compared with an RDMA-based distributed database.
papers.abstract_zh:
尽管经过数十年的研究，构建高效的分布式事务数据库仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。现有的分布式数据库通过网络同步跨主机并发数据访问，这需要大量的消息交换并引入性能开销。

我们描述了 Tigon，这是第一个分布式内存数据库，它使用 CXL 内存上的原子操作来同步跨主机并发数据访问。使用 CXL 内存比基于网络的方法更有效，但是，Tigon 必须解决 CXL 内存的限制。其局限性在于，相对于本地 DRAM，CXL 的延迟较高、带宽较低，而且对跨主机缓存一致性的硬件支持有限。对于 TPC-C 和 YCSB 的变体，与使用 CXL 内存作为传输的两个优化的无共享数据库相比，Tigon 的吞吐量提高了 2.5 倍，与基于 RDMA 的分布式数据库相比，吞吐量提高了 18.5 倍。
